# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for our legacy Python 2.7 application. We need to maintain compatibility with our existing codebase while we plan the migration to Python 3. Use an older base image that supports Python 2.7 and our legacy dependencies.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:2.7-slim
WORKDIR /app

# Install required packages for legacy app
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y gcc libssl-dev libffi-dev zlib1g-dev
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --trusted-host pypi.python.org -r requirements.txt

# Copy legacy application code
COPY . .

# Expose port for running the application
EXPOSE 80

# Run command when container starts
CMD ["python", "app.py"]
